<<<<<<< HEAD
<<<<<<< HEAD
---
title: "Davis_Burress_Zuo_Midterm_Project"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-03-01"
---

```{r}
DBZ_Data <- read.csv("DBZ_Data.csv")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2) 
```

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

boxplot(Days_Worked_Out ~ Gender,
        data = DBZ_Data,
        main = "Days Worked Out",
        col = "lightblue", "lightpink",
        xlab = "Gender",
        ylab = "Count")

boxplot(Protein_Shake_Drank ~ Gender,
        data = DBZ_Data,
        main = "Protein Shakes Drank",
         col = "lightblue", "lightpink",
        xlab = "Gender",
        ylab = "Count")
```
